overall.description: Third-person gameplay from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking through a historic Southern city at golden hour. The character travels from a residential cobblestone street lined with Greek revival mansions, crosses a road with horse-drawn carriages, and enters a public park with a central tiered fountain.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic residential street with Greek revival mansions

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the cobblestone sidewalk following a man in a white coat

notable_agents.action: man in white coat walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large Greek revival mansion with white columns and wraparound porch
ornate black wrought iron fence with stone pillars
wet cobblestone road reflecting the golden hour light
tall wooden utility pole with crossbars and wires
vintage black cast iron street lamp on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a historic residential street lined with Greek revival mansions on the left and iron fences on the right. The cobblestone street glistens in the golden hour light as the character follows a man in a white coat.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with horse-drawn carriage traffic

events.description: horse-drawn carriage passes from left to right across the intersection
crossing the street and entering the park through iron gates

agents.ego_description: crossing the cobblestone street while navigating around horse-drawn carriages

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage moving along the cobblestone street

entered.detail: tall stone perimeter wall with decorative capstones
wooden carriage with red wheels pulled by brown horses
open wrought iron gates marking the park entrance
crossroads where multiple cobblestone streets meet

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a wide intersection where horse-drawn carriages pass by. The stone walls of the park come into view on the right, and the character enters through an iron gate, leaving the residential street behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: public garden with central tiered fountain

events.description: character slows and begins circling around the tiered fountain

agents.ego_description: walking through the park and circling around the central tiered fountain

notable_agents.action: woman in pink dress standing near the fountain

entered.detail: large three-tiered stone fountain with water flowing into a circular basin
curved gravel walking path through the park
wooden park bench under the shade of trees
massive oak tree with spreading branches covered in Spanish moss
circular flower beds with blooming plants

segments.scene_description: The character enters a lush public park with dense vegetation and Spanish moss hanging from oak trees. The scene centers on a large tiered fountain, which the character approaches and circles around while walking on gravel paths past flower beds and benches.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a stately residential district into the lush sanctuary of a public park during the golden hour. It begins by trailing a man in a white coat along a glistening cobblestone street lined with Greek revival mansions and ornate iron fences. As the character reaches a wide intersection, the camera captures horse-drawn carriages passing by before the scene shifts toward the stone walls and iron gates of a nearby park. The environment then transforms into a verdant landscape of dense vegetation and oak trees draped in Spanish moss. Finally, the camera follows the character along gravel paths and past flower beds to circle a large, tiered fountain at the heart of the greenery.
